frontMatter.title: Connect Xiaomi Temperature and Humidity (LYWSD03MMC) Bluetooth Sensor to Home Assistant
frontMatter.author: Amrut Prabhu
frontMatter.summary: In this article, we will look at how we can connect the Xiaomi Temperature and Humidity (LYWSD03MMC) Bluetooth Sensor to Home Assistant
